official_sources.authority_note: Official binary dependency for constructing the smallest GameProfile accepted by the Login clientbound finished packet fixture.
Official binary source for constructing the Login clientbound login_finished packet fixture.
Official binary source for Login clientbound login_finished packet body encoding through ByteBufCodecs.GAME_PROFILE.
Official binary source for Login clientbound login_finished framed packet encoding.
Official binary source for Login clientbound login_finished framed packet dispatch/decode.
Official binary source for the Login clientbound packet table.
Official binary source for reading decoded login_finished fields, terminal flag, and confirming the Login listener clientbound surface.

field_notes.profile_id: Smallest zero UUID accepted by GameProfile(UUID, String) and ByteBufCodecs.GAME_PROFILE.
field_notes.profile_name: Smallest non-null String accepted by GameProfile(UUID, String) and the official PLAYER_NAME stringUtf8(16) codec.
field_notes.properties: Omitted by using GameProfile(UUID, String), which official bytecode delegates to PropertyMap.EMPTY.

stop_boundary: Proves Login clientbound login_finished packet framing and dispatch/decode for one official zero-UUID empty-name empty-property GameProfile fixture only; do not infer authentication success, Login-to-Configuration state transition handling, profile property semantics, skin/session trust, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
